title: Acrylic Cube Vases - 10cm, 15cm, and 18cm - Vases for Flowers, Candles, and Succulents - Modern and Stylish. (1 Vase, 10cm Cube)
features: Create a stunning centerpiece for your dining table: Fill a large acrylic cube vase with fresh flowers or succulents for a beautiful and eye-catching centerpiece.
Add a touch of elegance to your coffee table: Place a small acrylic cube vase on your coffee table with a few candles or a small bouquet of flowers.
Safe, lightweight, alternative to glass. Fill acrylic cube vases with water and place your favorite photos inside. This is a unique and stylish way to display your memories.
Made from hard wearing and durable acrylic material. Create a terrarium: Fill an acrylic cube vase with soil and plants to create a beautiful terrarium.
Ideal for weddings and corporate events. Store your office supplies: Use acrylic cube vases to store pens, pencils, and other office supplies in a stylish and organized way.
Crafted from premium materials which offers excellent durability and long-term use and is easy to clean for lasting use and enjoyment in any interior or outdoor space
Modern & Stylish Acrylic Cube Vase for Flowers, Candles, Succulents, Flower Frogs, Goldfish Bowls - Extra Large Plastic Flower Vases for Living Room, Clear Vases, Orange Round & Cylinder Vases Sets.
description: Safe, lightweight, alternative to glass, a cost effective container for displaying flowers. The cylinder vase is made from hard wearing and durable acrylic material. Ideal for schools, offices and work areas.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Add a touch of elegance to your home décor, Available in three sizes, so you can choose the perfect size for your needs, Crystal clear, so you can see your flowers or other decorations from all angles, Durable and shatterproof, so you don't have to worry about them breaking, Perfect for displaying flowers, candles, succulents, or other decorative items
